13.reason: [The format string "%d " consumes trailing whitespace, which may cause the next input to be read prematurely or block unexpectedly; it should be "%d" without the space. Additionally, the push operation proceeds even when the stack is full, because the assignment `stack[top++] = num;` is not inside an `else` block.]
